title: Fall Prevention Poster
scenario: Design a poster that prevents falls in the workplace. The poster should include information on how to safely navigate the workspace, how to use personal protective equipment, and what to do in case of a fall. The poster should be visually appealing and easy to read. Keep it under 500 pixels wide.
constraints: Must use at least three colors

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the poster is visually appealing and easy to read.
Check if the poster includes the required information on fall prevention.
Check if the poster is under 500 pixels wide and uses at least three colors.
